sqlMap.select: select * from PaymentDetail where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into PaymentDetail(TransactionSequence, PolicyKey BankerName RoutingNumber AccountNumber ChequeNumber Amount ContactPerson ContactPhone FinanceCompanyName Detail TransactionID TransactionDate TransactionStatus PaymentMode LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp FinanceInterval FinanceDownPayment CreatedDate CreatedBy ) values (#TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #BankerName# #RoutingNumber# #AccountNumber# #ChequeNumber# #Amount# #ContactPerson# #ContactPhone# #FinanceCompanyName# #Detail# #TransactionID# #TransactionDate# #TransactionStatus# #PaymentMode# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #FinanceInterval# #FinanceDownPayment# #CreatedDate# #CreatedBy# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('PaymentDetail') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select BankerName, RoutingNumber, AccountNumber, ChequeNumber, Amount, ContactPerson, ContactPhone, FinanceCompanyName, Detail, TransactionID, TransactionDate, TransactionStatus, PaymentMode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, PaymentDetailId, FinanceInterval, FinanceDownPayment, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey from PaymentDetail where PaymentDetailId = #PaymentDetailId# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update PaymentDetail set
BankerName = #BankerName# BankerName = null RoutingNumber = #RoutingNumber# RoutingNumber = null AccountNumber = #AccountNumber# AccountNumber = null ChequeNumber = #ChequeNumber# ChequeNumber = null Amount = #Amount# Amount = null ContactPerson = #ContactPerson# ContactPerson = null ContactPhone = #ContactPhone# ContactPhone = null FinanceCompanyName = #FinanceCompanyName# FinanceCompanyName = null Detail = #Detail# Detail = null TransactionID = #TransactionID# TransactionID = null TransactionDate = #TransactionDate# TransactionDate = null TransactionStatus = #TransactionStatus# TransactionStatus = null PaymentMode = #PaymentMode# PaymentMode = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null FinanceInterval = #FinanceInterval# FinanceInterval = null FinanceDownPayment = #FinanceDownPayment# FinanceDownPayment = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null
where PaymentDetailId = #PaymentDetailId# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PaymentDetail where PaymentDetailId = #PaymentDetailId# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from PaymentDetail where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select BankerName, RoutingNumber, AccountNumber, ChequeNumber, Amount, ContactPerson, ContactPhone, FinanceCompanyName, Detail, TransactionID, TransactionDate, TransactionStatus, PaymentMode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, PaymentDetailId, FinanceInterval, FinanceDownPayment, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey from PaymentDetail where PaymentDetailId = #PaymentDetailId# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select PaymentDetailId, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, BankerName, RoutingNumber, AccountNumber, ChequeNumber, Amount, ContactPerson, ContactPhone, FinanceCompanyName, Detail, TransactionID, TransactionDate, TransactionStatus, PaymentMode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, FinanceInterval, FinanceDownPayment, CreatedDate, CreatedBy from PaymentDetail where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
